segments.text: Pooja has to start at the time when it has to start.
I've been waiting and waiting, then I realized that today
is a very good time according to their calendar
but It's not in morning so
So had be third day of moon
And as Moon is changing its phases
In daytime we have wait till it started
I think all these things have happened of the theft and everything has happened, perhaps
to delay the puja upto point where it should start.
So in Sahaja Yoga we go beyond time – now you don't need worry about timing only
when its a formal function or something because people are formal they do not understand
our styles so be present there at right times.
Otherwise, we should just allow the time to take its own course and move in our way.
Now for this travel tour you have realized that here is a certain amount of height
in our detachment, we have to rise into the realm of
Our state while the circumstances surround us.
They are surrounding Us and they should not make
us unhappy or biased
Or We shouldn't react To them
On The contrary
You Should try
to rise above that, if there are no events of mishaps then you cannot see the surmounting
quality. If the surmounted quality has been seen we have
But if there is a stone, then the water splashes against it, creates
beauty and surpasses. This Is The sign of
Divine surmounting all the difficulties that are supposed to be There
Now we Are proceeding to Pune
And where We'll Be Having a proper Session
Also for Marriages & All That

I must speak about it today that the steadiness of mind is very important for marriages, if
you've certain concepts and are whimsical its better not get married because thats
not found in Indian character once they decide for marriage their married forever but
If the mind is still wavering, going up and down it's a trick of the mind that wants
to play tricks with others.
And enjoys – this sign of ego absolutely as I know feel
…and then you start playing games…you enjoy
Yes no yes No
You go on enjoying those games
Later one you play into so much
That your marriages can never be happy or successful

For marriage, we have to be matureed
but one of the reasons
what this I find in the West is
that he had no training at all
parents never told how to behave towards your husband
towards her wife
How do make our marriage successful
and it's very important event
And then
We should try
To establish ourselves
In the marriage system
Instead of that, we use it as a nice trick playing ground.
We miss the point – who is loser?
If you go on playing tricks like this and playing with your ego
whatever You may do
what ever type marriages will have
…you can never be happy
Now in West I lead another life also
And every person I've met,
Every Person whatever country they may come.
Nobody seems to be happy in their marriage
It's very surprising
it seemes
Every wife finds something wrong with the husband
The Husband finds Something Wrong With a Wife
and They have funny miserable faces
There don't look like married people but as if like criminals
or something has really gone wrong with them
there is no smile on Their face
They look horrid because they have missed the point.
Marriage is to be enjoyed, it's for your enjoyment!
Supposing one gives you ambrosia
Amrut as we call him
and then start playing trick with It
Who Is The Loser?
So must know that We Have To Achieve That Maturity
And enjoy that love
Basically if somethings very wrong
Or if there's no possibility of a proper marriage, in Sahaja Yoga we have arrangement to give
it up.
You can change your wife or husband – not problem!
But then must be some reason behind just for fun sake…
If you want spoil the life I'll try my level best and tell that don't spoil

talking with and asking them
it becomes marriage bureau for me

no more marriages in Sahaja Yoga
had enough of It

this is nobody tries understand
What Im trying
Is make you happy
get good husbands and wives
That you should have good relationships,
You Should Have great people on this earth to be born.
that we should a society which is beyond all these nonsensical societies
Which Is so Great
We can create homogeneous family among ourselves of purity and holiness

If there's fight going one gets really fed up

is a

off Indian ocean say for example

Different styles

take away what comes at us and whatever comes
our way should be taken from you

Nobody falls or rises in Love

so this Absurd idea of falling in love

Thatin Sahaja Yoga we cancel

It's just waiting there, but suddenly you decided on some spot
Suddenly your alright I find at the spur of moment I finally know
I say, what's this?
The horse was going all right.
Suddenly – What has happened?!
It is turned round!
One can understand a horse but i cant' understand human beings so these whimsical behaviour
suddenly ah…can be very injurious to the growth of Sahaja Yoga . Whenever
Whenever I go to England, there's a list of people from all over the country.
This marriage has gone rotten that had been rotten and that was rotten while I'm boasting
everyone about Sahaja Yoga marriages never fail –I know it is not true but whatever
i say in mantra ultimately becomes truth so time will come when no more marriages
will fail but you have to join hands with Me and cooperate, I should understand.
How much i've worked hard bring about these events?
And marriages shouldn't make your happy or unhappy because marriage is not the
ultimate in life – what it happens after marriage people get lost they don´t come
to Sahaja Yoga!
After that we are enjoying our honeymoon for last three years wonderful sahajogis

really do not how to solve these problems because
think there's no problem at all only thing you have decided
Not enjoy anything supposing

So try to help Me in this otherwise i'll give up my marriage business because it

. And for no rhyme reason you should

How much money have got, how many the other person has gone.
Whatever we want to see can be seen for yourself

but greatest thing is that

how much Sahaja Yoga does one knows

specially if beginners who beginning to take Sahaja Yoga

so they can ascend very well and must fast

world ever happened on these earths so far your marriages of very important and seen

and how they where giving You tributes

But If Your are a Seeker
or if you aren't seeking higher ascent
then go into nonsensical things and nonsensical ideas
So better be careful not to do such a thing, don't think too much of yourself.
Another note off caution that you see the way Indians pamper their son-in laws so
they won get mad also they pampered there daughter in law very much is done
India create better relationships because we dont have the balloon of ego

You go off. So better be careful

Look for daughter in laws
Now it is ingrained from ages
I doesn't mean that
That your are God

The son in love normally and you should not carry away

It's not so
So please be careful when your marrying Indians
You'll find their parents will quite pamper
look after you, they'll call to their house do this give money or ornaments all kinds

But still one has understand that it's just a custom and should not get pampered on the

no training about marriages.

is regarded as absolutely unmanly

so You Can Understand why
